reviews.author: Dhruv Sharma
reviews.text: If staff rating option could exist I would have given negative as one star is also not good in that case. They are worse. Location is the only saving grace — convenient if you rely on public transport. Everything else fell short of basic expectations. Housekeeping was non-existent during our 2-night stay. Despite reque

reviews.author: Mila Vankova
reviews.text: We really enjoyed our stay here. The contact with the hotel was very easy and they are fast responding. We arrived late but everything was prepared and on point. The room is spacious and warm, even with kitchen supplies. Far from Paris Center, but close at the same time - 20 minutes with metro (the station is only few

reviews.author: Antónia Ribeiro
reviews.text: Although not super close to the center of the city, it has a metro station right in front, making it easy to get around. Close to the hotel there are plenty of supermarkets and places to eat. Would definitely stay again.

reviews.author: Arige Naccache
reviews.text: Precilla the receptionist was great and very helpful. Our stay was really good! The bed was comfortable, the service and the atmosphere were great too! Only thing I would recommend is to upgrade the bathrooms, because they are big but they just need to look more like a hotel bathroom and less like a hospital bathroom.

reviews.author: Alok Mankar
reviews.text: Perfect place and with Metro access to reach City Centre in approx 20 mins including the walk to the station. The receptionist and the STH team were extremely helpful in accommodating my room change request and helped with all essentials and local recommendations I asked them

reviews.author: Aiden
reviews.text: I lived here for a semester abroad and I had the best time of my life while being there. Rooms were very nice and there was a great community aspect. I made many friends and became friends with some of the receptionists who made me feel at home: Ioana and Bruno. They are very friendly and it never felt like you were al

reviews.author: Mugesh M
reviews.text: I’ve been staying at ECLA for almost 2 years now, and it has truly been an amazing experience! It’s a perfect long-stay option for both students and working professionals. The community here is vibrant and diverse — a great place to network and connect with people from different parts of the world. I’d especially like

reviews.author: Alexander Sink
reviews.text: Updated: So they reply and ask you to contact customer support, but DONT BOTHER, they don’t reply to you also. 📍 STAY CLEAR IF YOU WANT YOUR DEPOSIT BACK!!! At check-in, everything is marked as “clean” on the inventory, and minor dust is dismissed since the room was supposedly prepared beforehand. However, at check-out

reviews.author: Yağmur Koçoğlu
reviews.text: Terrible staff who seem to genuinely dislike dealing with people. For example, when the laundry machines don’t work, they don’t send any communication—no email, not even a note on the laundry door. They just let you pay for nothing, and then get annoyed when you ask when it will be fixed. Just three weeks ago, one staf

reviews.author: E. Asgaraly
reviews.text: Pros: The only real positives are the apartments themselves. They are brand new, very clean, and well-designed with great layouts. Additionally, the neighborhood feels safe. Cons: Location & Shopping: There are no large supermarkets or organic food stores nearby. You only have access to small local convenience stores u

reviews.author: Thomas
reviews.text: I really enjoyed my stay at Ecla Paris Villejuif. The hotel was great, offered good value for money, and the overall experience was very pleasant. The receptionist was extremely friendly and always helpful whenever I had a question or needed assistance. My room was very nice and clean, which made the stay even more com

reviews.author: Isuru Dissanayake
reviews.text: I stayed a night here with my family. Booking was done thru Booking.com. The staff had done all the arrangements with regard to check-in. I arrived Paris in a midnight and the hotel staff informed me that I can check-in anytime and kept the room keys at the security. The security could speak only French but thanks to G

reviews.author: O J
reviews.text: Nice, basic hotel. Clean and not expensive. My son will be attending university there soon as an exchange student, so I took him to see Toulouse beforehand. Friendly staff on reception, quiet street, but a lot of walking. Ubers are easy to get. Room has everything you need, if a little small. One lamp at my bed was not

reviews.author: Elizaveta Gerasimova
reviews.text: A hotel with a modern, simple design. The property shows signs of wear from frequent guests. The room is very small, more suitable for one person than two. We booked a double room through Booking.com, but were given a room with two small beds pushed together. I’m not sure if this was a hotel mistake, so I mention it ju

reviews.author: Laura Carolina
reviews.text: I enjoyed four nights here. Clean, functional room with comfortable bed, two desks with chairs, nice shower, kitchenette. Pleasant front-desk staff. Easy bus-ride from airport, then five-minute walk to hotel. There is no bar for an evening drink; just a breakfast room.

reviews.author: Eli Mandelbaum
reviews.text: Absolutely wonderful stay at XO Hotel Paris! Everything about this hotel was fantastic, but the real highlight was the reception staff. From the moment I arrived, they were incredibly kind, welcoming, and genuinely caring. Always smiling, always helpful, and truly made me feel at home. The hotel itself is beautiful, cl

reviews.author: Juste Lapinske
reviews.text: We had a really great stay here — it’s a proper, solid four-star hotel. The rooms are cozy and spotless, and compared to many hotels in Paris, they are surprisingly spacious. The interior is beautiful, stylish, and warm, with a large bathroom, which felt like a real treat. The neighborhood is surrounded by plenty of li

reviews.author: Gal Perelsztejn
reviews.text: Breakfast is great and costs 21 euros per person if you don't pre order. Service is decent, rooms are nice and clean enough. The bed was very large and comfortable. Lovely atmosphere and great(!) location. Close to 2 different metro lines, about 15 minutes walk from Arc The Triumph on Champs Elysses.

reviews.author: Eli Mandelbaum
reviews.text: Absolutely wonderful stay at XO Hotel Paris! Everything about this hotel was fantastic, but the real highlight was the reception staff. From the moment I arrived, they were incredibly kind, welcoming, and genuinely caring. Always smiling, always helpful, and truly made me feel at home. The hotel itself is beautiful, cl

The interior is beautiful, stylish, and warm, with a large bathroom, which felt like a real treat. The neighborhood is surrounded by plenty of li

reviews.author: Gal Perelsztejn

Lovely atmosphere and great(!) location. Close to 2 different metro lines, about 15 minutes walk from Arc The Triumph on Champs Elysses.

reviews.author: Chloe Cantave
reviews.text: I had a great experience staying here for the first year of my masters. The staff was always very friendly and quick to help with anything.

reviews.author: Amina Bakour
reviews.text: It was an amazing experience for me & my husband there the rooms very clean & nice . The hotel service team was professional & kind especially the young receptionist "AYA" 🥰 , I would like to come back again 😍

reviews.author: mobina tavakolian
reviews.text: I lived there for a year, and Françoise, who is the manager there, is very kind. I had a lot of great moments there. Sometimes there are parties, and it’s really nice to take part in them you get to meet lots of new friends. The buildings are very clean and modern🥰

reviews.author: Kornelija Balas
reviews.text: Great student accommodation in an excellent location. The team managing the residence is highly professional. A special mention goes to the manager, who was particularly helpful and attentive throughout. We had a very pleasant and positive experience and would definitly recommend it.

reviews.author: Karla Vanessa Guevara Meléndez
reviews.text: The residence is very nice, everything is new, clean and with all the necessary amenities . The best in UXCO H2O is Ms. Ketty who took very good care of me, with a smile and a very nice attitude, she facilitated my moving into La Rochelle… she really cares about international students!✨

reviews.author: Helina Dereje
reviews.text: i am living at uxco for almost a year now, i was warmly welcomed by Marie who was accomodating and helpful the whole time. The location of this residence is great since you can find what you need around you. The residence is safe and modern. Ketty as well as Marie made the residence seem like home by decorating the com

reviews.author: Samuel Scherzer
reviews.text: I lived in this residence from September 2025 to June 2026 and my experience has overall been quite positive. The space in my apartment was very nice arranged. Infront of the residence there is a train station, with which you can get easily and fast into Paris and you have supermarkets all around you. The manager is al

reviews.author: Ananyaa Juyal
reviews.text: The residence is very well located, with excellent transport connections nearby. RER D, RER H, T8, and Metro Line 13 are all close to the residence, making it very easy to travel to and from Paris. There is also a convenient shopping area within walking distance, with stores like Lidl, Carrefour, a pharmacy, and Action

reviews.author: Ally9900 Lee
reviews.text: I like the apartment very much, the location is also very good, just 3 minutes away from the train station. The current building manager is very helpful, even though my French is not very good, he tried to communicate and solve problems.

reviews.text: Personnel and location are very good. It could have been a solid 5 starts, if not some very annoying sides of the residence: - Ultra, ultra hot during summers - Wifi with authentication that logs you out every 2-3 days. Double annoying when you’re in the middle of something important and you suddenly lose internet conn

reviews.author: Nazrin Nasirova
reviews.text: Wifi logging out every 2-3 days, it is so frickin annoying. I have 6 different devices and it is a mess.

reviews.author: Emma Herrero
reviews.text: Very convenient location for attending to nearby universities. Bus station right outside is an added benefit.

reviews.author: Aadarsh Ramakrishnan
reviews.text: I continue to have a great experience living here at the Residence. The Manager Fanny is quite helpful and easy to resolve any problems, if they do occur and is empathetic. Thank you!

reviews.author: Vikranth Tirumuru
reviews.text: Wonderful place to stay! Residence manager Fanny had been really professional and helpful.

reviews.author: Wenjin YAN
reviews.text: This is the second year that I lived in this student residence and I just extended my contract for another year. Not just because of the great location (10 minutes to ESSEC, the station, and Auchan), good facilities (cinema room, gym, and rooms with excellent views), fair price, and taking care of your packages, it is

reviews.author: Miia H
reviews.text: I studied at Alliance Française for month and I'm from Finland. My experience was mainly positive, but if someone is planning to spend only one month like I did, I would recommend staying in a hotel instead of renting a room for one month because the insurance is worrying and a lot of paper, you need to buy so many thi

reviews.author: Marta Kołacz
reviews.text: I have a positive experience. It is close to the historic center, the bus station and train station. I had also a positive experience with the staff: responsive and helpful manager and assistants. Other people who work in the building (e.g. the cleaning personel) are also very kind.

reviews.author: Oumaima Rouis
reviews.text: The location is great , it’s near the city center and the bus station. You have the washing room in the building, the rooms are spacious. The manager is very helpful and understanding. I recommend it.

reviews.author: Tanaka Kimberley
reviews.text: I had an excellent five-month stay as an exchange student. The location offered convenient access to transportation and shops. The manager, Catherine, was very helpful, friendly, and pleasant. Overall, it was an excellent choice.

reviews.author: Karim Hamze
reviews.text: I had a wonderful 6 months stay at the residence it was a wonderfull experience, the staff was extremely helpful 24/7 especially MRs Catherine ROUSSEL who was always helpful whenever i needed.

reviews.author: Ahmed Yahya
reviews.text: The residence is perfect clean fully organised. The residence is manager Madam ROUSSEL is extremely helpful and respond immediately when contacted.

reviews.author: Tamar Kheladze
reviews.text: I moved out of Room HQ 1709 (Asnières-sur-Seine) on January 6th. My move-out inspection was identical to my move-in (Zero damages). By French law, they had 1 month to refund my deposit. It is now MARCH. The finance team is non-responsive. Not only are they ghosting my refund requests, but their internal system is a mes

reviews.author: hello
reviews.text: We stayed at the hotel for a week and were generally satisfied with everything. The room was clean, the usual normal breakfast, there is a laundry service for an additional fee. But unfortunately, we had to face a very unpleasant situation. We have made an insurance deposit, which cannot be returned to us after 1.5 mon

reviews.author: maja rajevac
reviews.text: I recently stayed at the Twenty Campus Asnières Sur Seine( 7 days) and had an excellent experience. The space was impeccably clean and well-maintained, ensuring a truly comfortable stay. The location is fantastic—just a three-minute walk to the metro, McDonald's, a pharmacy, and a grocery store, making it easy to get a

reviews.author: Carl Gemayel
reviews.text: Service, trustworthiness and customer care are horrible! I give this residence a 0! The people that work there are present once week (that is every other week!), they do not answer emails, they scam students by not responding. For someone going to study, I do not recommend it at all because the person will be scammed!

reviews.author: Fanny Tar
reviews.text: I spent a long time at this residence and I highly recommend it. It's a very quiet place and impeccably clean. A huge thank you to the manager, Sifaqes, who is exceptional: responsive, kind, and always available, whether by phone, email, or in person. He managed the difficulties of this past winter (floods and power ou

reviews.author: Abdel
reviews.text: Excellent accommodation, the neighborhood is spotless. Responsive staff. I highly recommend it!

reviews.author: Kp Ks
reviews.text: Will not reccomend.The toilet flush was not working at all, and it took them three months to fix it , and it was a shared apartment for three. They were not responsive at all about the issue , did not answer any emails. Throughout my stay they claimed I did not pay one months rent and kept sending letters saying they w

reviews.author: Mikhail Ilmenskii
reviews.text: I lived in a studio in this student residence for one year during my doctoral studies and I can say that this is the best student residence I have ever lived in. It is new, the room is well equipped and even when you move in it has a rather cozy atmosphere, my apartment were spacious and also had a very large and spaci

reviews.author: Pavle Aleksov
reviews.text: It's great for shorter stays. I lived there for almost four years. Some plumbing and heating issues started appearing after the first year. My biggest complaint is about the management. They weren't very responsive in the online communication. It also felt like they almost didn't believe me the issues exist and they di

reviews.author: Hadis
reviews.text: I have been living in this residence for 9 months. The staff are very polite and considerate, and they have always responded to my requests with respect. However, the furniture and appliances are used and break easily with the slightest pressure, especially the bathroom and toilet equipment. The residence is quiet, loc

reviews.author: Soumava Paul
reviews.text: A bunch of arrogant jerks who are just out to get you. Almost zero chance of getting your security deposit back when you are about to leave. The owner is the biggest jerk of all and has a muscle-man/bouncer on call to intimidate you if you try to protest against any mistreatments or unfair bills during inventory. In my

reviews.author: H L
reviews.text: very close to rer station, new building, quiet neighborhood

reviews.author: Chewi
reviews.text: Excellent residence with convenient services, a great location, and a responsive manager. I lived there for three years while I was studying, and it was a really pleasant place to live. A big plus was the reservable common room, although the internet connection was sometimes quite poor. Apart from that, everything was

reviews.author: Coralie Kerisit
reviews.text: Excellent experience at UXCO GAYA. The setting is fantastic, and if there are any problems, Solenn is always available to help. I recommend this residence, which is quieter than others I've stayed in.

reviews.author: B FARYS
reviews.text: Residence close to all schools. Bright and spacious apartments. A friendly, available, and attentive caretaker (Solene). (Reassuring for a student mom :) ). Laundry room, TV room, coworking space... all within the residence. Safe and quiet "university" neighborhood. Everything a student needs is nearby: schools, tram,

reviews.author: Rafik Boudalia
reviews.text: A superb, quiet, and very well-managed student residence, thanks to the excellent Mr. Sylla. Since his arrival, many things have been resolved and repaired, including water leaks, maintenance of common areas, and, most importantly, improved security within the residence.

reviews.author: Jepèse Jepèse
reviews.text: Having lived in this residence for almost five years, I consider my rental experience to have been quite good. The apartment is clean, new, and functional, with utilities included in the rent (water, electricity, Wi-Fi), and the residence is ideally located. These undeniable qualities are offset by past security issues

reviews.author: Sarah El
reviews.text: If I could give zero stars, I would. It's truly the worst place to live. It's not bad in terms of proximity to the metro and markets, but everything else is a disaster. The hot water was cut off without any explanation for over a month, with absolutely no communication from management. When you have a problem requiring

reviews.author: Ziad Saeed
reviews.text: Terrible experience There is no safety in the building at all - I personally had an incident with some drunk men inside. The manager is rarely available; even at checkout, i leaved the place in a very good condition much more clean than when i came, only to have almost half of my security deposit charged with some sill

reviews.author: Robert Malcea
reviews.text: Excellent experience! All issues were resolved promptly and efficiently. The accommodation is modern, clean, and very comfortable. It is exceptionally well-managed by Mr. Youssouf, who is incredibly kind and welcoming. The location is great, and the entire building is well-maintained and up to high standards. Highly re

reviews.author: kyuya ilker
reviews.text: Unfortunately, my experience with this residence turned out to be very negative. I had actually written a positive review here before, but after moving out of the room I encountered so many negative issues that my opinion completely changed. When leaving, I caused absolutely no damage; on the contrary, when I first mov

reviews.author: Trishala Dutta
reviews.text: I have lived here for more than a year and love it. It's charming, compact, with all amenities and in an amazing location. Mustafa at the reception is really kind and helpful. He will always greet you with a warm smile, every-time he see you. He goes above and beyond with providing information to enhance the entire exp

reviews.author: Monica Metcalf
reviews.text: The workers were fine but overall the space is not clean and the furniture is very cheap and not sturdy. The photos displayed look way nicer and cleaner than any of the actual spaces. Would not recommend staying here

reviews.author: Taufeeq Khan
reviews.text: Good residence with central location inside Paris. Rooms are spacious and have private toilets, showers, and kitchenette. Reception is always friendly and willing to provide support when issues arise. Would recommend it for incoming students.

reviews.author: Éléa Juignier
reviews.text: A very positive experience over the past two years. The residence is located just steps from the university campus and close to useful shops. It's very quiet. The apartments are modern and well-equipped. The various common areas are also pleasant and well-maintained, ensuring the residents' comfort. It's also worth not

reviews.author: Timéo Boulanger
reviews.text: J’ai habité dans la résidence pendant 1 an et c’était la meilleure année d’étude supérieure que j’ai pu vivre ! Les appartements et les salles communes sont très bien entretenues. En parlant de salles communes tout nous est mis à disposition : une salle de travail, calme et pratique pour travailler, une salle de jeu tr

reviews.author: Kerwin Siri
reviews.text: This kampus, is ideal for students, notably in vatel or the CHU faculty. I highly recommend this place. Severine, the kampus 30 manager was extremely helpful👍👍

reviews.author: Nouha Baba
reviews.text: I had a wonderful stay at the Uxco K30 residence. The facilities are modern, well-maintained, and very well located, but what makes this residence truly special is the kindness of the people who live and work there. The staff is always welcoming, available, and caring, and the atmosphere among the residents is really f

reviews.author: RAMATOULAYE NDIAYE
reviews.text: Uxco Nîmes is simply amazing! The manager (Jeremy) is really cool and attentive. The residence is quiet, with good neighbors, and it's not far from Ma Valieu, just 5 minutes away. The common room is relaxing and pleasant.

reviews.author: Melanie M.
reviews.text: + Benefits: • On Tuesday, you can find a regional market just beside the U-Express (supermarket at tram station Bourgeonnière). • The period of notice is just one month. - Disadvantages: The cost-benefit-ratio is horrendous due to the following reasons: • I had the smallest studio (21m²). The interior was modest and th

reviews.author: Aladin Shr
reviews.text: I would like to share a positive experience at einstein residence, everything respects the criterias of a student dorm , july the manager have always assisted me and provided all the required support during my stay.

reviews.author: Akshay Karthikeyan
reviews.text: UXCO Einstein 2 was my home for nearly 10 months . It was good distance from the tram stop. Had all the necessary facilities like laundry room, gym, especially a party hall which was really convenient to host parties. And the rooms are also well maintained. The manager on site is really helpful in aiding with all your

reviews.author: Tuğba DURMUŞ
reviews.text: I had a great experience staying at this residence in France. The facilities were clean, comfortable, and well-maintained, but what truly made the difference was the management. The manager was incredibly helpful, knowledgeable, and always available to assist with any questions or concerns. Their dedication and profess

reviews.author: 费芳华
reviews.text: The student accommodation is great, with a small gym, a bike parking area, and a shared lounge. Occasionally, they organize events as well. In addition, the surrounding amenities are very convenient, with a Lidl right next door that caters to daily needs. Having lived here for six months, I’ve really enjoyed the time s

reviews.author: Arvie Talavera
reviews.text: I like my stay there. My room was nice and cosy and very near the city center. Cherine was also very nice and she attended to my needs and answered the questions I have. Moreover, there was a common room where you can meet with friends, cook and party!

reviews.author: Danny .Haffel
reviews.text: Great location for students since it’s near the line 1 and the C6. Access to grocery stores and it has all the amenities. Though not very close to the center of town it’s a great price for a students budget.

reviews.author: Julius Faupel
reviews.text: The residences are functional and intact. The residence manager Stacy does an outstanding job of caring for the tenants and is always available to help. Thank you!

reviews.author: Kalin leo
reviews.text: The location is very convenient, Lidl and carrefour are right behind the residence. The staff is very kind and helpful.

reviews.author: Alexis Artaud
reviews.text: Two perfect years. The residence is very well managed. A big thank you to Jérémy and André for their warm welcome and efficiency in responding to every request during these two years. The team is professional and always available. We wish them continued success.

reviews.author: Andrée Moriconi
reviews.text: Two major drawbacks of the residence. The first is the noise in the evenings/nights. Games are organized in the hallways and in the elevator. reviews.author: Gordon Guggisberg
reviews.text: Madam Ohiba , is one Wonderful Woman At Letheleme, she’s very hard working, always ready to look at your problems and help you. She very passionate and patient about people in the building. I will forever recommend her. Always at your service to make you happy and comfortable

reviews.author: Cleiton Marques
reviews.text: I arrived at the residency in January 2022, not knowing anyone in town and not speaking French. Fortunately, I was very well welcomed by the local manager, Nolwenn. She had simply prepared everything for my arrival and helped me with everything I needed. Also, she gave me great tips about the city. The residence is ver

reviews.author: Pierre KASSAR
reviews.text: My stay at la Residence was very pleasant , the building is safe and cozy . The manager was amazing and helpful . i definitely recommend it especially if you are an MBS student because it is only 12 min reachable by Bus.

reviews.author: Anita Chergeshtova
reviews.text: My experience began with deception from the manager even before arrival. The choice was between two residences, and I was ready to book this one only on the condition that my apartment would not be above the railway to avoid noise. reviews.author: Nosrat Abouhamzeh
reviews.text: Studio and building is good for students and workers.

reviews.author: Nosrat Nigar
reviews.text: The situation and room is good but manager isn’t good and not available

reviews.author: Pablo DNA
reviews.text: Quiet and secure residence. With a very good location, close to public transport, a sports stadium, and all shops for groceries, bread, etc. The apartment is perfectly equipped for a student or someone just starting out in their professional life. This eliminates the need to purchase furniture or kitchen utensils. Wash

reviews.author: Elias Müller
reviews.text: Very nice residence :) Dorine is the best Manager and even answered all my concerns in English 😊

reviews.author: Giuditta Cioffi
reviews.text: I lived in these residences for six months. I highly recommend them. The accommodation process was easy. The staff were kind and helpful with any issues, which were resolved promptly. reviews.author: Chine Poyet l
reviews.text: I spent two years at the La Pommerie student residence and frankly, I have very fond memories of it. A special shout-out to Vin

reviews.author: Валерия Кружева
reviews.text: I’ve appreciated my stay in this residence. First of all, I thank the staff for their attention and fast resolution of issues. Secondly, my room was well equipped and even my friend that stayed with me for a couple of days found it nice enough. I really loved the district close to the center and all facilities. Perfect

The apartments are modern, clean, and well-maintained. The atmosphere is calm and secure, which makes it easy to feel at home. The management team is always available, professional,

reviews.author: Alex Martinez
reviews.text: I really enjoyed living in this residence at first. The administration team is very kind, especially Lionel, who has always been helpful. However, every weekend the lobby smells strongly of marijuana, common and coworking spaces are often left completely destroyed. Because of this, if you are looking for a calm place w

reviews.author: Caro de la Rosa
reviews.text: I’ve had a great experience living at this residence. Lea, the manager, is incredibly nice, attentive, and always willing to help with anything you need. The location is extremely convenient because the metro station is very close, and the area feels very safe even at night. One of the best things about living here is

reviews.author: Keila Capriles
reviews.text: Uxco is the best place to stay if you are studying in toulouse, there is always something to do here and with the metro everything is close. Thank you Lea, Fred and Lionel for making me feel at home, also thank you to Allyssia and Edgar for your help with the booking💕💕

reviews.author: Ludwig Laukert
reviews.text: I love the residence. It is in the green. The river Lez is flowing closeby and the zoo and the Parc Bois de Montmaur is just in walking distance. The public transportation to downtown is very good. However it is a little noisy because of construction going on to build the railway for the tram Ligne 5. But when it is fi

reviews.author: Chris Kavetsos
reviews.text: The "value for money" of this residence is very good. The main disadvantage is that it's far away from the city center which can be an issue if you don't have a car or a motorcycle. The connection with the means of public transportation is good but it still takes a lot of time to get to the center of Montpellier.

reviews.author: Maryam parvardegari
reviews.text: A great student dormitory with excellent access to buses, trains, the city center, and all universities, along with outstanding management.

reviews.author: Katharina Nowak
reviews.text: My child had a very positive experience staying at UXCO student fleep. The residence is modern, clean, very comfortable and secure for students. They were especially impressed by the study rooms which were quiet, well equipped and extremly helpful for focusing on study work. The common areas were also a big advantage,

reviews.author: mia mccleary
reviews.text: DO NOT BOOK THIS ACCOMMODATION. From the start this place has been awful. When I first moved in, in September, one of the old mangers (as there have been two others in my only six month stay ),Sarah assaulted me (she now has a police report against her and was fired) due to lack of competence to be able to take care of

reviews.author: Sanjana Shankar
reviews.text: I would definitely recommend students or employees to book an apartment at UXCO. The manager, Victor, is incredibly helpful and cooperative. 🙌 Any query or concern is immediately resolved by him, and he’s always there for tenants. For English speakers, you’ll be happy to know that he speaks excellent English! 🗣️✨ Big t

reviews.author: nina bernard
reviews.text: Excellent residence. Quiet and secure, close to schools and amenities. The common room, laundry facilities, and small gym with free access are very convenient! The apartments are clean, as are the common areas, and the photos on Google accurately reflect reality. The residence manager is available, responsive, and frie

reviews.author: sekrafi anwar
reviews.text: Everything went well during the four-month stay. However, during the final inspection on the last day, the manager focused on truly minute details. For interns, I wouldn't recommend this residence if your internship ends after August, as the summer contract expires in August and is not renewable, so you'll have to find

reviews.author: Théophile Aujoulet
reviews.text: A very quiet residence; I was lucky enough to have an apartment overlooking the courtyard, which was very pleasant. The residence manager is very attentive and available both in person and by phone and email. The buildings are very clean and well-maintained. I just spent two years there and I felt very comfortable!

reviews.author: Uxue Gondra
reviews.text: I’m gonna be staying here for the next school year and it’s an amazing place. Very well located if you’re going to the MBS school of business in Montpellier as it’s just located 10 minutes walking. Nearby there is also the tram , and it’s just 20 minutes to get you to the center. They have a sauna and a gymnasium as we

reviews.author: Zoe Nascimento
reviews.text: I stayed in this residence for a few months. They were the only ones who answered me when I was looking for an apartment/residence so I’m very thankful for it. Although the residence is located in one of Montpellier’s dangerous neighborhoods, I never had any issues and the people living in the residence are very nice a

reviews.author: mustapha Labban
reviews.text: Good stay, Le proprietaire Amine is really good, easy to talk to and responsive. Building is nice, room is nice. If you are an MBS student it's really convenient, tram station is really close and you have a gym and a supermarket in the area, and MBS is 2 stations away (10mins).

reviews.author: Vittorio Orlando
reviews.text: I stayed at UXCO Hugo Park in Lyon for six months and had a great experience. The residence is clean, comfortable, and conveniently located close to the city center. It offers all the essential services you need for a long stay, and the apartments are comfortable and spacious. A special mention to Pasquale, the residen

reviews.author: Daniele Spica
reviews.text: The apartments are good and functional and furnished with everything you need. There are also common places with other services such as the washing machines. Overall I think it’s one of the best residence for students in the city, also thanks to the manager Pasquale which is always available to solve problems and to he

reviews.author: Alexandru Jecan
reviews.text: I rented a studio for 6 months. Everything was very good. Pasquale, the manager of the building is very nice and very good at his job. He made the process of renting very easy and straightforward. He always respond via email or WhatsApp for all the requests I had. The building is really well maintained, clean , good in

reviews.author: an na
reviews.text: The common zones don’t work, the gym is useless they should invest more in the equipment. The rent is overpriced.

reviews.author: Natali Spalatini
reviews.text: Horrible experience. briefly: first day bed for 3rd person wasn`t settled so 3of us needed to squeeze on one small bed. the rest of our stay there wasn`t hot water there. No one apologized. If you have to choose between sleeping there or under some bridge choose other option. At least you`ll not feel the frustration an

reviews.author: Reza Yousefian
reviews.text: The most terrible place! Don’t get fooled by going there! I got my apartment dirty and like a mess, anytime (5-6 times) I asked for cleaning staff no one showed up. The hot water has been cut off for weeks. They do not know even what they should do to repair it! Very bad customer service! Better to say no service at al

reviews.author: kusuma k
reviews.text: To everyone looking at this accommodation: Be warned. reviews.author: Aldo Artigiani
reviews.text: My daughter lived there 3 months with high satisfaction. Good cleaning and well equipped room. Nice common space with good gym, cleaning machines and kitchen for possible common meals

reviews.author: Tarapatla Venkatesh
reviews.text: They will not return back your deposit, rude owner

reviews.author: Jacque
reviews.text: I lived here for the 2024-25 academic year. The apartment is nice, but I cannot recommend it. The current property manager is extremely rude and unprofessional. She yelled at me for 5 minutes, then insisted there was no problem, and ignored my emails requesting further clarification and discussion. If you're an interna

reviews.author: Khaled Mamdouh
reviews.text: This company has a very bad financial system, they refund the deposits late after check-out, happened to me twice with L'Atelier and another UXCO residence. In addition, they don't pay the 10% of rent penalty enforced by the French law on landlords for every month of late deposit refund. I've been sending emails to the

reviews.author: Bora Surmeli
reviews.text: The bad faith shown by the management of this residence is quite spectacular. For a tiny mark on the kitchen floor (the size of a fingernail) and in the gap between the shower door and the glass, they charge you €108 for cleaning. I advise you, if possible, not to choose this residence.

reviews.author: Oliwczaxx !
reviews.text: I stayed in this residence for 1.5 years and had a truly great experience. Marco was always kind, helpful, and approachable — you can really tell he cares about the residents. Whenever I needed anything, he was there with a smile and a solution. The location is excellent, everything is convenient and well connected. I

reviews.author: Chase Joshua
reviews.text: As an international student, it is always tough finding a suitable accommodation. When I enquired, the manger did not have availability but two weeks later he emailed me again as a place opened up and asked if I was still interested. That kind of proactiveness tells you everything about how great of a property manager

reviews.author: eli bikdelo
reviews.text: I stayed here for 3 months, the rent is very expensive, and after 2month days they still haven't returned my deposit, even though I have to leave this country. Finally, after two months and two days and many follow-ups from the main company and not Marco, the residence manager, the money was deposited to me.

reviews.author: Gold Coast Gyms
reviews.text: I lived at the UXCO residence for a little under a year. I never post reviews, however I want to prevent people from making the same mistake I made The staff and the organization are extremely poor and do not prioritize residents. The staff are never in the office, the numbers on the office do not work, they do not res

reviews.author: Kenneth Tsue
reviews.text: Stayed here from 2022.06 to 2022.12 I give it one star as it's impossible to assign 0 star here. Awful experience. 1. No one speaks English despite advistsed as a place for international students. 2. Their "contractor" broke in my room more than 4 times, each time they made a mess, moved my items, and broke some as wel

reviews.author: Emre Bayril
reviews.text: As its surroundings may never be something you would find beautiful, you can take a break from the city here. Mrs. Gurgen is too good at her job and she gets all the things done. I highly recommend this place.

reviews.author: Louise Cant
reviews.text: Good location - but not managed very well! My daughter lived here from Sept 23- May 24. When we moved her in we had to deep clean the room and listed a whole load of issues with the room, blocked shower and broken light bulbs. The room was cold as the heating was not connected in her room! Eventually she was given an e

reviews.author: Catherine NAHAS
reviews.text: Been in this residence for 2 years now, and my door broke in August 2021... Still no one came to fix it for me. They said they had discussions with a company that would come and fix it but still no answer... It's been more than a week without hot water, and we never get answers or informations of when is the reparation

reviews.author: Thomas Fowler
reviews.text: I stayed here from January to March. I was supposed to stay for longer but have opted to move. Frédéric is a lovely man but I do not recommend the services of Nexity quite highly. Upon my refund request I was lied to about how much I would receive back, charged an extremely high amount of 350 euros just because I lost

reviews.author: SUBIN LIM
reviews.text: Overall, my time at UXCO le Spot was great. The manager Théo is helpful and understanding. I had a bit of a problem with payment in the beginning, but Théo helped me avoid paying the penalty fee. Just make sure to check everything before you move in, such as under the mattress, if you don't want to get charged for some

reviews.author: Aurore Duval
reviews.text: A very good experience at The Spot. Théo and Emma, ​​the managers I had, are incredibly friendly, responsive, and always there to help when we had questions. The accommodations are really lovely, modern, and well-maintained. You quickly feel at home in the residence. I highly recommend it! Even though there are always

reviews.author: Asma Bahrod
reviews.text: The Le Spot residence is really great. The atmosphere is fantastic, the tenants are friendly, and you quickly feel at home. The apartments are pleasant and well-maintained, and life in the residence is very convivial. I highly recommend it!

reviews.author: Stephan Windischer
reviews.text: I did my semester abroad in Montpellier and lived in this residence. It was a very pleasant and quiet residence with very nice neighbours. You can get to the city in 10 minutes by Tram and there is a big Casino (supermarket) 10 minutes away by foot. The housekeeper is always there for you if you need anything. Overall,

reviews.author: Valérie POINT
reviews.text: My son lived at the Apothicaire residence for a year and a half. For those living far from Montpellier, this residence is a godsend thanks to its location near the medical school and public transportation. Everything is provided for settling into their apartments; the residence is secure and the apartments are well-fur

reviews.author: Letícia de Freitas Vieira
reviews.text: I lived at the residence for just over three months and everything went very well! The residence is new, well-equipped, and well-maintained. The rooms are comfortable and already have some basic amenities, which makes short stays easier. The common areas are always clean, but could be a bit larger, considering the numb

reviews.author: Yu Lei
reviews.text: I have been living in the UXCO student residence for two years, and overall it has been a very positive experience. The rent is reasonable and offers good value for money compared with similar student accommodations. The environment is clean, modern, and comfortable, which makes it a pleasant place to live and study. T

reviews.author: Nicky Andre
reviews.text: I've been living here for three years with my little family starting from T1, move to studio, then now in T2. It is very comfortable and safe residence for a small family with kids. The manager Mr. Roger are so kind and helpful as well as the employee majid which is very kind as well. I really recommend this residence

reviews.author: Maryam Farnam
reviews.text: I've been having an excellent experience here. Very clean, calm and comfortable residence, with a nice manager who's fluent both in French and English, and equipped with any sort of facilities you might need.

reviews.author: Fantasy Child
reviews.text: I lived there almost for 4 months and i spent a great time. The staff is very friendly, the rooms are comfortable and good.

reviews.author: laura bagnale
reviews.text: I stayed at the UXCO Lemon residence for almost 6 months while doing my PhD abroad. I had a great time here, the flat is very modern and comfortable, as is the entire building, which is clean and welcoming. The location is excellent, being very close to the tram and bus stops. The value for money is really great! Above

reviews.author: Lu
reviews.text: I’ve lived here for five months, and throughout my stay the staff have been consistently efficient and responsible — whether it was routine maintenance or unexpected issues, they responded promptly and resolved everything professionally. The building is clean, well‑maintained, and feels very safe. I’m truly grateful fo

reviews.author: MD
reviews.text: I lived here for a year in 2020 when I moved into Paris and safe to say it was unfortunately not a pleasant experience from start to finish. First of all, I found it to be incredible pricy for what I got. 850€ for a small room not including electric fees and wifi that barely worked that I resorted to using my data majo

reviews.author: Antonio Franco
reviews.text: I stayed at Le Consul for a few months. It's well communicated with metros 4 and 13 nearby, near Montparnasse and a tidy, quiet place to experience Paris. Would recommend, and would try and come back if I come back for a long visit

reviews.author: Stefani CHRISTIESON
reviews.text: I moved out almost a year ago and STILL haven't received back a single penny of my guarantee despite leaving the apartment with no damage. The office never answers and are not helpful. Do not recommend if you ever want to see your deposit again

reviews.author: Lorenzo Gada
reviews.text: The building is very well placed, close to 3 tram lines and the park of Port Marianne. The apartment are not of the most modern but they are well equipped and everything works fine. The manager is very considerate and quick to answer if there is any problem.

reviews.author: Michael McClure
reviews.text: Room perfect for the price. Parking good. Location excellent for the price. TV didn't work and calling reception 6 times went to recorded message talking too fast to understand.

reviews.author: Coffman Antho
reviews.text: This student residence in Montpellier is outstanding! With sleek and contemporary amenities, an ideal location and hospitable personnel, I highly recommend it for students who want to experience the best of the city.

reviews.author: Angie
reviews.text: Great location, the manager is very helpful, place is really clean.

reviews.author: Kelly
reviews.text: Worst experience with this residence. Never trust and book ANY Suitétudes!

reviews.author: Tristan Badana
reviews.text: The residence is well-located in Lyon, close to metro lines B and T2. My apartment wa

reviews.author: Natarajan kumarappan
reviews.text: New well-furnished studio apartments. Located in the vibrant presqu'ile area. Tram, bus stops are very close. No significant deductions from deposit. Sometimes could be noisy due to busy street and frequent fire alarm trigger.

reviews.author: Hanna Ates
reviews.text: It is a very good accomodation for students in Caen. The residency is in the city center, right next to the library. The mall is a 5 minute walk away, and there is also a trail along the river which is perfect for a walk, a jog or to bicycle on. For public transport, the tram stop is only a 2 minute walk away from the

reviews.author: cole faulkner
reviews.text: Clean, comfortable, convenient. Stayed here for stage and had a great experience. Special thanks to the building manager Madeline Leblanc who goes above and beyond for the residents.

reviews.author: Maria Belyaeva
reviews.text: Robin was the absolute best, always ready to help anyone out if they needed it. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: David Effi
reviews.text: Superb residence, I lived there for two years. The neighborhood is quite quiet and the location is perfect. Robin, the manager, is available and attentive to needs. You simply couldn't ask for a better manager. I highly recommend it!

reviews.author: Sarah
reviews.text: The residence has evolved considerably in recent years, becoming today a pleasant, peaceful, well-located place to live with high-quality services. Robin's arrival as manager is undoubtedly linked to these changes. We thank him for his professionalism and availability; he is truly dedicated to ensuring everything runs

reviews.author: Eva
reviews.text: The residence is close to everything. The C4 bus at the end of the small street takes me quickly to the Rennes School of Business. I was able to meet lsome students here from my school. The manager makes the effort to put in contact the tenants of the same schools. It's rather welcoming when you don't know anyone when

reviews.author: jepkoech kendagor
reviews.text: Beautiful residence designed for students. Situated in a convenient place, near bus stops and McDonald's is a walking distance from here. You can easily get to the city centre from the residence.

reviews.author: Diego Bejarano
reviews.text: Very nice place, I just arrived on Sunday and I am happy there. Suggestions: You should do as soon as you can the electricity contract

reviews.author: Dyanne Tan

reviews.author: Meriem Boussaha
reviews.text: Lovely residency with all you could possibly need, the rooms are clean and have a lot of storage space, the only minor issue I had was that the oven in the common area didn’t work, but it should be fixed by the next term.

reviews.author: Saravanan S
reviews.text: This is the worst place I've ever stayed in any country. My suggestion, for this price and this attitude towards their tenant

reviews.author: Charlie Chang
reviews.text: I've stayed here for 8 months during the period of my MBA program. Overall, it's good living experience. The apartment managers are nice, the environment is comfortable and quiet. reviews.author: sada tessougue

reviews.author: efe örnek

I'd like to give a special thanks to Sylvain for always be

reviews.author: BOBO JIA

reviews.author: Nour Zalzal
reviews.text: The best in the university area i love it

reviews.author: Oumayma Boussetta

reviews.author: linda Kn

reviews.author: Ngoc-Anh THAI

Then they will send all of the documents VIA MAILBOX of our old address (and of course you will not recognize about their existence). The later you recognize about it, the more you have to pay. Truly a scammer!

reviews.author: Kushagra Chopra
reviews.text: If this is your first time living in Paris this is a great place to stay! Aurelie and the team are very responsive and helpful. The building is in a safe neighborhood and is very clean. And the amenities are great (gym, laundry in basement, community kitchen, etc.) Great experience!

reviews.author: Ozgur Kurt
reviews.text: My daughter recently moved into this student accommodation, and we couldn't be happier with the experience. The place is clean, modern, and has been recently renovated. It's located in a lovely neighbourhood in Paris, which makes it even better. The manager, Aurelie, was incredibly helpful and professional, ensuring a

reviews.author: Ann-Sophie Loehrer
reviews.text: The moving process is very easy and understandable. The rooms are clean and the manager (Aurelie) alwas helps you with problems/ questions

reviews.author: Tommaso Tabet

That said, some promised amenities like the gym and internal access between building wings were never delivered, even though they were listed

reviews.author: M'hamed Nadem

reviews.author: Charlotte (Cha brcht)
reviews.text: Great residence, attentive and organized great evenings!

reviews.author: Camille Nope

reviews.author: Vergil
reviews.text: First of all, I would like to express my gratitude to Mr. Tolga. He is highly professional in his work, responded promptly to all my questions, and made it easy for me to take care of everything. Since I don’t speak French very well, he communicated with me in English and explained everything clearly. He was very helpf

reviews.author: Drew Varsava
reviews.text: I'd proceed with strong caution with this residence. Our daughter and two of her friends were coming to Saint Etienne for an exchange from Canada. After multiple emails, texts, and calls, we were told that the residence was saved and secure for them and we delivered the necessary documents as instructed by Baker Hill.

reviews.author: Khaled Mamdouh
reviews.text: The managers aren't responsive or helpful, and the company changes managers every now and then, leaving the residence with no support at all for extended periods. I didn't receive refund for my deposit more than 45 days after moving out. The place itself is nice but dealing with UXCO staff is an administrative nightmar

reviews.author: Jessica S
reviews.text: The residence is very clean and well-equipped. It's conveniently located near the universities and the neighborhood is safe. The manager is very kind and helpful, which is reassuring throughout my contract. I highly recommend it!

reviews.author: dina s
reviews.text: Having finished my studies, I sadly had to leave, yes, sadly. It had become my little home away from home, so well laid out, clean, soundproof, and above all, secure (I didn't know this before I arrived, but there are quite a few cameras and a security guard who watches over the building from evening until morning: it

reviews.author: Bastien g
reviews.text: Great residence! I've been living here for almost a year now. The residence is in a quiet area with a park right next to it, a rugby stadium 200 meters away, and plenty of other sports activities. Shops are also within a kilometer. The metro station is a 4-minute walk. As for the residence itself, we received a very wa

reviews.author: Ivan Poels
reviews.text: Good memories of the student residence. Very good location, all modern facilities available. Splendid follow-up of the residence manager. Ideal accommodation within walking distance for Oniris veterinary medicine students. Easy by bus to airport, Nantes City ,...

reviews.author: Caroline Rouze
reviews.text: A huge thank you to Cécile Rozanes for her presence, our discussions, her advice, and her support. The studio is well-equipped and very clean. Everything is done to welcome each student warmly, with kindness and trust.

reviews.author: CEB
reviews.text: I spent a year in the residence and I highly recommend both the residence and the neighborhood. The apartments are well-designed, furnished, insulated, and clean (brand new). The residence is very clean and very well managed by Mathilde and Corentin. I received excellent guidance from the team throughout the entire pro

reviews.author: Audrey
reviews.text: Excellent residence, modern, secure, and in a superb location. The manager, Leila, is pleasant and responsive. I highly recommend it.

reviews.author: Emma Pouillet
reviews.text: Excellent student residence: clean, modern, and pleasant to live in. Part of it has been recently renovated, so the apartments and common areas are really nice. Ideal location right across from the psychomotor therapy school and the physiotherapy school. Parking is available on-site. I highly recommend it 😊

reviews.author: RIGAL PATRICIA
reviews.text: It's difficult to get into the building because the access card doesn't always work. It's impossible to have a television because there's no TV outlet, and it's especially impossible to install a set-top box; the Wi-Fi connection in the building is extremely poor. The rent payment for December was increased by €50 for

name: Room in a 6 Bedroom Apartment, Clément Ader Street, Rosny-Sous-Bois

reviews.author: Andrei
reviews.text: I spent two wonderful years in this apartment. It was nicely renovated, located in a great neighborhood, and the landlord has always been kind and helpful. I truly enjoyed living here and would definitely recommend it.

reviews.author: David Luhan
reviews.text: Coliving is coliving is very comfortable. every room is new agency. thank you

name: Room in a 14 Bedroom Apartment, Valenciennes Street, Gagny
